title: Felicity’s Fortress
description:
A minefortress modpack!

Turn Minecraft into a real-time strategy Game!
body:
## Felicity’s Fortress Embark on an epic journey with the Fortress Modpack, powered by the Fabric mod loader. Centered around the Minefortress mod, build unassailable strongholds, conquer challenges, and shape your legacy in version 1.20.1. Not much more to add than what I've already given. It is centered around the [MineFortress](https://modrinth.com/mod/minefortress) Mod. This mod pack is designed for the Felicity's Fortress Minecraft server, and this is all add-ons. Any questions, you can direct to my Discord.
Feedback
